156.reason: [This line creates a Token with ErrorType but uses the Token constructor that expects LexType, causing getLexType() to be non-null and getErrorType() to be null, which prevents the error from being recognized as an error token in Compiler.java]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This line creates a Token with ErrorType but uses the Token constructor that expects LexType, causing getLexType() to be non-null and getErrorType() to be null, which prevents the error from being recognized as an error token in Compiler.java]

165.reason: [Same issue: passing ErrorType to a Token constructor that assigns it to lexType field instead of errorType, due to constructor overloading ambiguity based on parameter types]
